nodes.label: Curated Ledger Design System
nodes.rationale: Premium stationery journal aesthetic. Mood: Calm Authority. Airy, minimalist, editorial, refined. Rejects rigid fintech conventions in favor of tonal layering and generous breathing room. Stitch project 4123685228949170691.

nodes.label: Tonal Layering
nodes.rationale: Replaces traditional Material Design shadows (0-24dp). Depth achieved through background color shifts: Base (#f9f9f9) → Section (#f2f4f4) → Surface (#ebeeef) → Interactive (#ffffff). Ambient shadows reserved for FABs and modals only.

nodes.label: No-Line Rule
nodes.rationale: Standard 1px borders strictly prohibited for sectioning. Structural boundaries defined exclusively through background color shifts. Ghost border fallback: 1px #adb3b4 at 15% opacity on identical-color backgrounds.

edges.rationale: Closed positions display win/loss via tonal accent bars (Forest Depth vs Muted Brick), not traditional color coding.
